notes: catalog_object_owner resolves the current database owner from SblrExecutionContext
catalog_object_owner(uuid) resolves known catalog-object owner metadata
catalog_object_uuid returns the current database UUID
catalog_object_uuid(name
column12: object_class) resolves a known context-backed catalog object

notes: catalog_object_name returns the current database catalog display name
catalog_object_name(uuid) resolves a known context-backed catalog object name
catalog_object_class returns the current database catalog class
catalog_object_class(uuid) resolves a known context-backed catalog object class
descriptor_snapshot_id returns the current security/descriptor snapshot UUID from execution context
ExecutionTypeDescriptor returns deterministic compact JSON from SblrExecutionContext
column_descriptor(table_uuid
column12: column_name) returns a deterministic context-backed column descriptor

notes: column_descriptor returns the available context-backed descriptor summary
index_descriptor reports deterministic unresolved catalog snapshot metadata without storage lookup
index_descriptor(index_uuid) returns SQL null for an unknown catalog object UUID
diagnostic_field returns the current diagnostic id when no field name is supplied
diagnostic_field(name) resolves a named diagnostic field through SblrExecutionContext
diagnostic_count reports one active diagnostic for the current execution context
gdscode reports deterministic nonzero diagnostic code when an active diagnostic exists
last_error_position returns SQL null when no source position is attached to the current diagnostic
error_class maps SQLSTATE 42xxx to the canonical diagnostic class
